wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the OmniShield project overview section focused on the enterprise AI content moderation platform. Explain its purpose as a production-ready multi-tenant AI moderation system combining 6 specialized AI models, architecture overview, and relationship to other components. Document the implementation details including FastAPI backend, Next.js frontend, PostgreSQL database, Redis caching, Celery workers, and Docker orchestration. Include both conceptual overviews for beginners explaining what AI content moderation is and technical details for experienced developers about the multi-model ensemble approach. Use terminology consistent with the codebase such as 'comprehensive moderation', 'ensemble voting', 'risk assessment'. Provide practical examples demonstrating common use cases like NSFW detection, violence detection, weapon detection. Document public interfaces, parameters, and return values. Include diagrams where appropriate to illustrate key concepts like the request processing flow and model orchestration.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication & Authorization API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for authentication and authorization endpoints focused on user registration, login, JWT token management, and OAuth2 integration. Document the POST /api/v1/auth/login endpoint for credential verification, JWT token generation, and OAuth2PasswordRequestForm handling. Include request/response schemas with UserRegisterSchema, Token, and UserResponse models. Provide curl examples for registration and login flows, error handling for duplicate emails, invalid credentials, and deactivated accounts. Document JWT token structure, expiration handling, and bearer token usage in subsequent requests. Address security considerations including password hashing with bcrypt, input validation, and account status checks. Include client implementation guidelines with JavaScript/Python examples for token storage and automatic header injection.

wiki_catalogs.name: System Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the OmniShield platform's system overview focused on high-level architecture and technology stack. Explain the purpose of this enterprise AI content moderation platform, its core mission of providing multi-model AI detection across 6 categories (NSFW, violence, weapons, faces, text, gore), and how it serves different user types (API clients, platform admins, end users). Document the containerized microservices architecture showing nginx load balancer, FastAPI backend, Next.js frontend, PostgreSQL database, Redis cache, and Celery workers. Include the C4 context diagram illustrating external integrations with OAuth providers, cloud storage, monitoring systems, and email services. Provide detailed technology stack breakdown covering API gateway (nginx, FastAPI), backend (Python 3.12, Uvicorn), frontend (Next.js 16, React 19), AI models (NudeNet, CLIP, YOLOv8, MTCNN, PaddleOCR), database (PostgreSQL 15), caching (Redis 7), queue (Celery), and monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana). Address infrastructure requirements, scalability considerations, and deployment topology.

wiki_overview.content:
# OmniShield: Enterprise AI Content Moderation Platform - Comprehensive Project Analysis ## 1. Project Introduction ### Purpose Statement OmniShield is an enterprise-grade AI content moderation platform that combines **6 specialized AI models** to provide comprehensive content safety analysis for images and videos. Built with FastAPI + Next.js, it delivers production-scale performance with intelligent multi-model ensemble decisions and <2ms cache hits. ### Core Goals and Objectives - **Multi-Model AI Detection**: Integrate NSFW detection (NudeNet), violence detection (CLIP), weapon detection (YOLOv8), face detection (MTCNN), text moderation (PaddleOCR), and gore detection - **Enterprise Security**: Implement OAuth2, JWT authentication, API keys, rate limiting, and RBAC - **High Performance**: Achieve sub-millisecond cache hits through SHA256 image hashing and Redis caching - **Production Ready**: Docker containerization, Celery background processing, PostgreSQL persistence, and comprehensive monitoring ### Target Audience - Enterprise applications requiring content moderation - Social media platforms needing automated content filtering - E-commerce platforms with user-generated content - Educational platforms requiring safe content environments ## 2. Technical Architecture ### Component Breakdown The system follows a microservices-inspired architecture with clear separation of concerns: ```mermaid graph TB Client[Client / Browser] -->|HTTPS| Ingress[nginx Load Balancer] Ingress -->|Route| API[FastAPI Backend] API -->|Auth| Security[Security Layer
JWT / API Key / OAuth2] API -->|Cache Check| Cache{Redis Cache
SHA256 Hash} Cache -->|Hit <2ms| FastReturn[Return Cached Result] Cache -->|Miss| AI[Multi-Model AI Pipeline] AI -->|Parallel| NSFW[NudeNet
NSFW Detection] AI -->|Parallel| Violence[CLIP
Violence Detection] AI -->|Parallel| Weapon[YOLOv8
Weapon Detection] AI -->|Parallel| Face[MTCNN
Face Detection] AI -->|Parallel| Text[PaddleOCR
Text Moderation] NSFW --> Ensemble[Ensemble Aggregator
Risk Scoring] Violence --> Ensemble Weapon --> Ensemble Face --> Ensemble Text --> Ensemble Ensemble -->|3. Cache| Cache Ensemble -->|4. Log| DB[(PostgreSQL
Moderation Logs)] API -->|Batch Jobs| Queue[Celery + Redis Broker] Queue -->|Process| Worker[Background Workers] Worker -->|Store| DB API -->|Serve UI| Frontend[Next.js Frontend
React Dashboard] Monitoring[Prometheus + Grafana] -.->|Metrics| API Monitoring -.->|Metrics| Worker ``` ### Design Patterns **Repository Pattern**: Data access layer abstraction with dedicated repositories for each entity type **Service Layer Pattern**: Business logic encapsulation in service classes **Factory Pattern**: Lazy loading of AI models to optimize memory usage **Strategy Pattern**: Multiple AI detection strategies with pluggable implementations **Observer Pattern**: Background task processing with Celery workers ### System Relationships ```mermaid sequenceDiagram Client->>+API Gateway: Image Upload Request API Gateway->>+Security: Validate Auth Token Security->>+Database: Verify User Credentials Database-->>-Security: User Context Security-->>-API Gateway: Validated User API Gateway->>+Cache: Check SHA256 Hash Cache-->>-API Gateway: Cache Miss API Gateway->>+AI Pipeline: Multi-Model Processing AI Pipeline->>+NudeNet: NSFW Detection AI Pipeline->>+CLIP: Violence Detection AI Pipeline->>+YOLOv8: Weapon Detection AI Pipeline->>+MTCNN: Face Detection AI Pipeline->>+PaddleOCR: Text Analysis NudeNet-->>-AI Pipeline: Results CLIP-->>-AI Pipeline: Results YOLOv8-->>-AI Pipeline: Results MTCNN-->>-AI Pipeline: Results PaddleOCR-->>-AI Pipeline: Results AI Pipeline->>+Cache: Store Results AI Pipeline->>+Database: Log Moderation Cache-->>-API Gateway: Cached Response Database-->>-API Gateway: Confirmation API Gateway-->>-Client: Moderation Results ``` ## 3. Key Implementation ### Main Entry Points **Backend Application Entry Point** (`backend/app/main.py`) - FastAPI application initialization with CORS middleware - Security headers injection for production environments - Prometheus metrics endpoint configuration - Health check endpoints for monitoring **Configuration Management** (`backend/app/core/config.py`) - Pydantic-based settings management with environment validation - Database URL conversion for async/sync operations - Security validators for production deployments - Feature flags for AI model enablement ### Core Modules **Multi-Model AI Service** (`backend/app/services/multi_model_moderation.py`) - Lazy-loading architecture for AI models to optimize memory usage - Async parallel execution using ThreadPoolExecutor and asyncio.gather - Professional portrait detection override to reduce false positives - Comprehensive result aggregation with confidence calibration **Security Layer** (`backend/app/core/security.py`) - Dual authentication support (JWT tokens + API keys) - Role-based access control (RBAC) implementation - Rate limiting integration per user and API key - Password hashing with bcrypt security standards **Database Configuration** (`backend/app/core/database.py`) - Dual engine setup for async FastAPI routes and sync migrations - Connection pooling with pre-ping health checks - Session management with proper resource cleanup ### API Endpoints **Image Moderation** (`backend/app/api/moderate.py`) - Single image moderation with NSFW detection - Comprehensive multi-model moderation endpoint - Video moderation with frame extraction and batch processing - Batch processing with Celery background tasks **Authentication & Authorization** (`backend/app/api/auth.py`, `backend/app/api/keys.py`) - User registration and login with JWT token generation - API key management with rate limiting - OAuth2 provider integration points ### Configuration Approach **Environment-Based Configuration** (`docker-compose.yml`) - Multi-service orchestration with PostgreSQL, Redis, and Celery - Environment-specific settings for development and production - Volume mounting for persistent data storage - Health checks and dependency management **Frontend Configuration** (`frontend/package.json`) - React 18 with TypeScript 5 and Vite build system - Tailwind CSS for styling with PostCSS preprocessing - React Query for server state management - Axios HTTP client with interceptors for authentication ### External Dependencies **Core Framework Dependencies** (`backend/requirements.txt`) - FastAPI 0.137.0 for async web framework - SQLAlchemy 2.0.31 for ORM with async support - Pydantic v2 for data validation and settings management - Redis 5.0.7 for caching and message brokering **AI/ML Dependencies** - NudeNet 3.4.2 for NSFW detection (ONNX Runtime) - Transformers 4.37 for CLIP models (violence/gore detection) - Ultralytics 8.4.90 for YOLOv8 object detection - PaddleOCR 3.4.1 for text extraction and profanity detection - Facenet-PyTorch 2.5.3 for face detection (MTCNN) **Infrastructure Dependencies** - Celery 5.4.0 for background task processing - PostgreSQL 15 for persistent data storage - Docker containerization for deployment - Prometheus for metrics collection ### Integration Points **Caching Strategy** (`backend/app/services/hash_cache.py`) - SHA256-based image deduplication for <2ms cache hits - Configurable TTL policies for different data types - Memory-efficient caching with automatic cleanup **Background Processing** (`backend/app/tasks.py`) - Celery worker configuration for batch moderation jobs - Error handling and retry mechanisms - Progress tracking and status reporting **Monitoring & Observability** - Structured logging with Loguru - Prometheus metrics for request tracking and AI model performance - Health check endpoints for container orchestration ## 4. Key Features ### Functionality Overview **Multi-Model AI Detection System** - **NSFW Detection**: NudeNet v3.4.2 with 94%+ accuracy for explicit content - **Violence Detection**: CLIP zero-shot classification with strict thresholds - **Weapon Detection**: YOLOv8n for knives, guns, and dangerous objects - **Face Detection**: MTCNN for privacy protection and identity verification - **Text Moderation**: PaddleOCR + profanity filter for hate speech detection - **Gore Detection**: Custom CNN for medical gore and injury detection **Enterprise Security Features** - Dual authentication (JWT + API Keys) with role-based access control - Rate limiting per user and API key with configurable tiers - SQL injection protection and XSS prevention - Secure file upload validation with magic byte checking **Performance Optimization** - SHA256 image caching eliminates duplicate processing - Lazy model loading reduces memory footprint - GPU auto-detection with CPU fallback - Asynchronous I/O throughout the stack ### Implementation Highlights **Comprehensive Moderation Pipeline** (`backend/app/services/multi_model_moderation.py`) - Parallel execution of all AI models using asyncio.gather - Professional portrait detection override to reduce false positives - Confidence calibration and risk scoring across multiple models - Detailed bounding box coordinates for detected objects **Video Moderation System** (`backend/app/api/moderate.py`) - Frame extraction at configurable intervals - Background processing with progress tracking - Comprehensive analysis of video content over time - Storage optimization with selective frame retention **Analytics & Reporting** (`backend/app/api/analytics.py`) - Real-time moderation statistics and trends - Model performance metrics and accuracy tracking - Usage analytics and billing-ready data export - Customizable dashboards for different stakeholder needs ### Feature Architecture ```mermaid stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> ImageUpload: Client Request ImageUpload --> FileValidation: Validate MIME Type FileValidation --> CacheCheck: Calculate SHA256 CacheCheck --> CacheHit: Found in Cache CacheCheck --> ProcessModels: Cache Miss CacheHit --> ReturnResult: Serve Cached Response ProcessModels --> RunNSFW: Start NSFW Detection ProcessModels --> RunViolence: Start Violence Detection ProcessModels --> RunWeapons: Start Weapon Detection ProcessModels --> RunFaces: Start Face Detection ProcessModels --> RunText: Start Text Analysis RunNSFW --> AggregateResults: Get Results RunViolence --> AggregateResults RunWeapons --> AggregateResults RunFaces --> AggregateResults RunText --> AggregateResults AggregateResults --> ApplyOverrides: Professional Portrait Check ApplyOverrides --> UpdateCache: Store Results UpdateCache --> SaveToDB: Log Moderation SaveToDB --> ReturnResult: Send Response ReturnResult --> [*]: Complete ``` ## 5. Conclusion and Recommendations ### Project Architecture Summary OmniShield demonstrates a well-architected enterprise content moderation platform with several key strengths: **Architectural Strengths:** - **Modular Design**: Clear separation between API layer, business logic, and data access - **Scalable Infrastructure**: Docker-based deployment with horizontal scaling capabilities - **Performance Optimization**: Intelligent caching strategy achieving sub-millisecond responses - **Security-First Approach**: Comprehensive authentication, authorization, and input validation - **Observability**: Built-in monitoring, logging, and metrics collection **Technical Excellence:** - Modern async Python stack with FastAPI and SQLAlchemy 2.0 - Multi-model AI pipeline with lazy loading and parallel execution - Production-ready containerization with health checks and dependencies - Comprehensive testing infrastructure with unit and integration tests ### Potential Improvement Areas **Code Organization:** - Consider implementing a more granular repository pattern for better testability - Add circuit breaker patterns for external AI model dependencies - Implement structured error handling with custom exception hierarchy **Performance Enhancements:** - Add connection pooling for Redis and database connections - Implement model quantization for faster inference times - Consider CDN integration for static assets and cached results **Security Hardening:** - Add Web Application Firewall (WAF) integration - Implement request signing for API endpoints - Add comprehensive audit logging for compliance requirements ### Actionable Recommendations **Immediate Actions:** 1. **Dependency Updates**: Regularly update AI model dependencies to latest versions 2. **Security Audits**: Conduct regular penetration testing and security assessments 3. **Performance Monitoring**: Set up alerting for model degradation and system bottlenecks **Medium-term Improvements:** 1. **Microservices Migration**: Consider splitting into separate services for each AI model 2. **GraphQL API**: Implement GraphQL endpoint for flexible client queries 3. **Multi-region Deployment**: Add geographic distribution for global scalability **Long-term Evolution:** 1. **Custom Model Training**: Implement fine-tuning pipeline for domain-specific content 2. **Real-time Streaming**: Add WebSocket support for live content moderation 3. **Mobile SDKs**: Develop native iOS and Android libraries for mobile applications ### Next Steps for Project Evolution **Q2 2026 Priorities:** - Complete OAuth2 integration with Google and GitHub providers - Implement dark mode toggle and accessibility improvements - Deploy professional landing page and documentation site **Q3 2026 Roadmap:** - Launch GraphQL API endpoint for advanced querying - Implement webhook delivery system for real-time notifications - Deploy admin dashboard for system administration **Q4 2026 Vision:** - Enable custom model training and A/B testing framework - Implement multi-region deployment with failover capabilities - Launch video moderation and real-time streaming analysis features --- **Sources:** - [README.md](nudenet_project/README.md) - [main.py](nudenet_project/backend/app/main.py) - [config.py](nudenet_project/backend/app/core/config.py) - [multi_model_moderation.py](nudenet_project/backend/app/services/multi_model_moderation.py) - [moderate.py](nudenet_project/backend/app/api/moderate.py) - [user.py](nudenet_project/backend/app/models/user.py) - [database.py](nudenet_project/backend/app/core/database.py) - [security.py](nudenet_project/backend/app/core/security.py) - [package.json](nudenet_project/frontend/package.json) - [docker-compose.yml](nudenet_project/docker-compose.yml) - [requirements.txt](nudenet_project/backend/requirements.txt) - [axios.ts](nudenet_project/frontend/src/lib/axios.ts) - [main.tsx](nudenet_project/frontend/src/main.tsx)
